Text6.Name: Text6
Text6.Text:
I. Scholarship concession will be valid for all Installments subject to their attendance which should be at least 90% and above.
II. If He/She gets admission in any other college his/her admission in this college will automatically stand cancelled. Double Registration is illegal by law.
III. Scholarship student desirous of getting his/her Registration cancelled will be charged full installment at the time of cancellation of Registration.
IV. Leave application submitted by the Parent/Guardians will only be considered.
